title: GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates!
